failure.error_msg: output should be 1 not 0 assert Logic('0') == 1 + where Logic('0') = LogicObject(sync_pos_neg_edge_detector.o_positive_edge_detected).value + where LogicObject(sync_pos_neg_edge_detector.o_positive_edge_detected) = HierarchyObject(sync_pos_neg_edge_detector).o_positive_edge_detected
